name: agent-cost-console
description: AI API cost monitoring dashboard — like Datadog for LLM API calls

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/proxy && npm run build --workspace=packages/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/proxy/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/dashboard/tsconfig.json
